/usr/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Epoller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/HttpConn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/main.cpp.o  -o server  -lpthread
